# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

```yaml
stages:
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  CI_COMMITTER_EMAIL: $CI_PROJECT_DEFAULT_EMAIL # Use default email if not set
  RELEASE_BRANCHES: "master"  
   
.trigger-deployments-with-changes %%gitRefName, gitDesc%%GitLab CI Pipeline to trigger deployments with changes as per merge request title and description in build notifications & commit messages." -f features/$CI_COMMIT_TITLE featureDeployment ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}-$$(uuid)
  .prepare-ci %%gitRefName, gitDesc%%Catch exceptions that may occur during the ci (e.g., 'unable to run docker') by creating required jobs in GitLab CI." -f scripts/catcherrors pipeline ${CI_PIPELINE_ID} featureDeployment
  .deploy-app %%gitRefName, gitDesc%%Catch exceptions and release the app version (e.g., 'unable to start service') by creating a deployment job in GitLab CI." -f scripts/release pipeline ${CI_PIPELINE_ID} featureDeployment
  .mergeRequestTitleAndDescription %%gitRefName, gitDesc%%Catch exceptions and log the merge request title or description into console (e.g., 'unable to parse yaml') by creating a job in GitLab CI." -f scripts/parsing pipeline ${CI_PIPELINE
